options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: goal
options.description:
What is required to complete the game.
Slime Diva: Defeat the Slime Diva boss (level 10).
Lord Zuulneruda: Defeat Lord Zuulneruda in the Catacombs (level 12).
Colossus: Defeat the Colossus in Crescent Grove (level 20).
Galius: Defeat Galius in Bularr Fortress (level 26) - DEFAULT.
Lord Kaluuz: Defeat Lord Kaluuz in Catacombs Floor 3 (level 18).
Valdur: Defeat Valdur the dragon (level 25+).
All Bosses: Defeat all 6 major bosses.
All Quests: Complete every quest in the game.
Level 32: Reach the maximum level.

options.name: random_portals
options.description:
How area portals are unlocked.
Off (default): Progressive Portals - find "Progressive Portal" items to unlock
areas in a fixed sequence. Each portal found opens the next area in order.
On: Random Portals - find individual portal items (e.g. "Outer Sanctum Portal",
"Catacombs Portal") to unlock specific areas independently.

options.name: shop_sanity
options.description:
Whether shop items can contain Archipelago items from other worlds.
When enabled, buying items from shops sends checks to other players.

options.name: main_class
options.description: What you chose to be as your main class

options.name: secondary_class
options.description: What you chose to be as your secondary class

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.
